hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -q '\.py$' && python3 -m ruff format "$f" && python3 -m ruff check --fix "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -q '\.py$' && python3 -m mypy "$f" --no-error-summary 2>/dev/null; } || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -q 'index\.html$'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Blocked: index.html is the tracker. Confirm with user before editing."}'; elif echo "$f" | grep -q 'sync_notes\.py$'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Blocked: sync_notes.py is infrastructure. Confirm with user before editing."}'; else echo '{}'; fi; }
